response.rule: Connected set-partition numbers; standard recurrence for the sequence
Standard recurrence for the associated Motzkin-type sequence
Start at 16, then cumulatively add successive prime fourth powers
a(n)=n·a(n-1)+(-1)^n p_n, with successive primes p_n
Odd terms are Catalan numbers; even terms are powers of 3
Cumulative recurrence with successive powers of 3
a(n)=n^5+p_n, where p_n is the nth prime
Start with 4^3, then cumulatively add cubes of successive composite integers
